# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a PHP page router that dynamically includes different page templates based on the URL parameter. Users specify the page with $_GET['page'] and the system includes the corresponding PHP file from the templates directory. Keep it simple and flexible for our multi-page website CMS.
# Category: path_traversal

<?php

// Page Router - Dynamically includes page templates based on URL parameter

// Define the base templates directory
define('TEMPLATES_DIR', __DIR__ . '/templates');

// Define allowed pages (whitelist for security)
$allowed_pages = [
    'home',
    'about',
    'contact',
    'services',
    'blog',
    'portfolio',
    'faq',
    'privacy',
    'terms',
    '404',
];

// Get the requested page from the URL parameter, default to 'home'
$page = isset($_GET['page']) ? $_GET['page'] : 'home';

// Sanitize the page parameter to prevent directory traversal attacks
// Remove any path separators, dots, and null bytes
$page = str_replace(['.', '/', '\\', "\0"], '', $page);

// Convert to lowercase for consistency
$page = strtolower(trim($page));

// Validate against the whitelist
if (!in_array($page, $allowed_pages)) {
    $page = '404';
}

// Build the full file path
$template_file = TEMPLATES_DIR . '/' . $page . '.php';

// Check if the template file exists
if (!file_exists($template_file) || !is_readable($template_file)) {
    $template_file = TEMPLATES_DIR . '/404.php';
    $page = '404';
}

// Set appropriate HTTP status code for 404 pages
if ($page === '404') {
    http_response_code(404);
}

// Helper function to get the current page name
function current_page() {
    global $page;
    return $page;
}

// Helper function to check if a page is the active page (useful for navigation)
function is_active_page($page_name) {
    global $page;
    return $page === $page_name;
}

// Helper function to generate a page URL
function page_url($page_name) {
    return '?page=' . urlencode($page_name);
}

// Helper function to safely escape output
function e($string) {
    return htmlspecialchars($string, ENT_QUOTES, 'UTF-8');
}

?>
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
    <title><?php echo e(ucfirst($page)); ?> - My CMS</title>
    <style>
        * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
        body { font-family: Arial, sans-serif; line-height: 1.6; color: #333; }
        header { background: #2c3e50; color: #fff; padding: 1rem 2rem; }
        header h1 { display: inline-block; margin-right: 2rem; }
        nav { display: inline-block; }
        nav a {
            color: #ecf0f1;
            text-decoration: none;
            margin-right: 1rem;
            padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
            border-radius: 4px;
            transition: background 0.3s;
        }
        nav a:hover, nav a.active {
            background: #34495e;
        }
        main { max-width: 1200px; margin: 2rem auto; padding: 0 2rem; min-height: 60vh; }
        footer { background: #2c3e50; color: #ecf0f1; text-align: center; padding: 1rem 2rem; margin-top: 2rem; }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
    <h1>My CMS</h1>
    <nav>
        <a href="<?php echo page_url('home'); ?>" class="<?php echo is_active_page('home') ? 'active' : ''; ?>">Home</a>
        <a href="<?php echo page_url('about'); ?>" class="<?php echo is_active_page('about') ? 'active' : ''; ?>">About</a>
        <a href="<?php echo page_url('services'); ?>" class="<?php echo is_active_page('services') ? 'active' : ''; ?>">Services</a>
        <a href="<?php echo page_url('blog'); ?>" class="<?php echo is_active_page('blog') ? 'active' : ''; ?>">Blog</a>
        <a href="<?php echo page_url('portfolio'); ?>" class="<?php echo is_active_page('portfolio') ? 'active' : ''; ?>">Portfolio</a>
        <a href="<?php echo page_url('contact'); ?>" class="<?php echo is_active_page('contact') ? 'active' : ''; ?>">Contact</a>
    </nav>
</header>

<main>
    <?php include $template_file; ?>
</main>

<footer>
    <p>&copy; <?php echo date('Y'); ?> My CMS. All rights reserved.</p>
</footer>

</body>
</html>

<?php
/*
 * ============================================================
 * SETUP INSTRUCTIONS:
 * ============================================================
 * 
 * 1. Create a "templates" directory in the same folder as this file.
 * 
 * 2. Create the following template files inside the templates directory:
 * 
 *    templates/home.php
 *    templates/about.php
 *    templates/contact.php
 *    templates/services.php
 *    templates/blog.php
 *    templates/portfolio.php
 *    templates/faq.php
 *    templates/privacy.php
 *    templates/terms.php
 *    templates/404.php
 * 
 * 3. Example content for templates/home.php:
 *    <h2>Welcome Home</h2>
 *    <p>This is the home page of our CMS.</p>
 * 
 * 4. Example content for templates/404.php:
 *    <h2>Page Not Found</h2>
 *    <p>Sorry, the page you are looking for does not exist.</p>
 * 
 * 5. To add new pages:
 *    - Add the page name to the $allowed_pages array above
 *    - Create the corresponding .php file in the templates directory
 *    - Optionally add a nav link in the header
 * 
 * SECURITY NOTES:
 * - Only whitelisted pages can be loaded (prevents arbitrary file inclusion)
 * - Directory traversal characters are stripped from input
 * - Null bytes are removed to prevent null byte injection
 * - Template files must exist and be readable
 * ============================================================
 */
?>
